query:
You are working on the Kotlin/kotlinx.coroutines repository.
The codebase is at version 1.6 (commit: 67e21b24).

## Issue to Resolve

CoroutineScope.future() may trigger global exception handler on cancellation
### Expected behavior

`future` coroutine builder delivers all errors via the returned object, just like `async`.

### Actual behavior

`future` coroutine builder can suddenly trigger global exception handler that may crash the application.

Sample code:
```kotlin
fun main() {
    val future = GlobalScope.future {
        error("foo")
    }
    future.cancel(true)
    Thread.sleep(100)
}
```

Result:
`Exception in thread "DefaultDispatcher-worker-1" java.lang.IllegalStateException: foo`

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

I believe `CompletableFutureCorotine` should not attempt to handle the exception in any other way than completing the returned `CompletableFuture`. For now, [this is not the case](https://github.com/Kotlin/kotlinx.coroutines/blob/d88a8c227a295f91251960c8fe6b21a02ddf704b/integration/kotlinx-coroutines-jdk8/src/future/Future.kt#L63).

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `kotlinx-coroutines-core/jdk8/src/future/Future.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality
